improvements.name: Attribute
improvements.page: Adjusts the values for one of the character's Attributes. Positive numbers increase an Attribute. Negative numbers decrease an Attribute. Select an Attribute to affect by clicking the Select Value button. Value adjusts the Attribute's current value. Minimum adjusts the Metatype's minimum value for the Attribute. Maximum adjusts the Metatype's maximum value for the Attribute. Metatype augmented maximum values are automatically adjusted based on the new Metatype maximum. Fields may be left at 0 if you do not want to affect that particular aspect of the Attribute.

improvements.name: Condition Monitor, Physical
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of boxes the character has in their Physical Condition Monitor. Positive numbers increase the number of boxes in the Condition Monitor. Negative numbers reduce the number of boxes in the Condition Monitor.

improvements.name: Condition Monitor, Stun
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of boxes the character has in their Stun Condition Monitor. Positive numbers increase the number of boxes in the Condition Monitor. Negative numbers reduce the number of boxes in the Condition Monitor.

improvements.name: Condition Monitor, Threshold
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of boxes between each Condition Monitor Threshold. Positive numbers increase the number of boxes between each Threshold. Negative numbers reduce the number of boxes between each Threshold.

improvements.name: Condition Monitor, Threshold Offset
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of boxes between the start of each Condition Monitor and the first Threshold. Positive numbers increase the starting position of the first Threshold. Negative numbers reduce the starting position of each Threshold.

improvements.name: Living Persona, Biofeedback Filter
improvements.page: Adjusts the Living Persona's Biofeedback Filter Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve the Biofeedback Filter Rating. Negative numbers reduce the Biofeedback Filter Rating. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Living Persona.

improvements.name: Living Persona, Firewall
improvements.page: Adjusts the Living Persona's Firewall Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve the Firewall Rating. Negative numbers reduce the Firewall Rating. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Living Persona.

improvements.name: Living Persona, Response
improvements.page: Adjusts the Living Persona's Response Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve the Response Rating. Negative numbers reduce the Response Rating. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Living Persona.

improvements.name: Living Persona, Signal
improvements.page: Adjusts the Living Persona's Signal Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve the Signal Rating. Negative numbers reduce the Signal Rating. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Living Persona.

improvements.name: Living Persona, System
improvements.page: Adjusts the Living Persona's System Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve the System Rating. Negative numbers reduce the System Rating. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Living Persona.

improvements.name: Skill
improvements.page: Adjusts the value for one of the character's Skills by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Skill. Negative numbers decrease the Skill. Select a Skill to affect by clicking the Select Value button. The modifier can be applied to the Skill's Rating by selecting Apply to Rating, otherwise the modifier is applied as a dice pool modifier.

improvements.name: Skills in Category
improvements.page: Adjusts the value for all of the Skills in one category by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Skills. Negative numbers decrease the Skills. Select a Skill category to affect by clicking the Select Value button. The modifier can be applied to the Skills' Ratings by selecting Apply to Rating, otherwise the modifier is applied as a dice pool modifier.

improvements.name: Skills in Group
improvements.page: Adjusts the value for all of the Skills in a Skill Group by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Skills. Negative numbers decrease the Skills. Select a Skill Group to affect by clicking the Select Value button. The modifier can be applied to the Skills' Ratings by selecting Apply to Rating, otherwise the modifier is applied as a dice pool modifier.

improvements.name: Skills linked to Attribute
improvements.page: Adjusts the value for all of the Skills linked to an Attribute by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Skills. Negative numbers decrease the Skills. Select a linked Attribute to affect by clicking the Select Value button. The modifier can be applied to the Skills' Ratings by selecting Apply to Rating, otherwise the modifier is applied as a dice pool modifier.

improvements.name: Armor, Ballistic
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Ballistic Armor Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve Ballistic Armor. Negative numbers reduce Ballistic Armor.

improvements.name: Armor, Impact
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Impact Armor Rating by the value entered. Positive numbers improve Impact Armor. Negative numbers reduce Impact Armor.

improvements.name: Reach
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Reach by the value entered. Positive numbers increase Reach. Negative numbers reduce Reach.

improvements.name: Unarmed DV
improvements.page: Adjusts the Damage Value for a character's Unarmed Attacks by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Damage Value. Negative numbers decrease the Damage Value.

improvements.name: Unarmed DV Physical
improvements.page: All of the character's Unarmed Attacks will do Physical damage instead of Stun damage.

improvements.name: Unarmed AP
improvements.page: Adjusts the Armor Penetration value for a character's Unarmed Attacks by the value entered. Positive numbers reduce Armor Penetration. Negative numbers increase Armor Penetration.

improvements.name: Initiative
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Initiative by the value entered. Positive numbers increase Initiative. Negative numbers reduce Initiative.

improvements.name: Initiative Passes
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of Initiative Passes the character receives by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the number of Initiative Passes. Negative numbers reduce the number of Initiative Passes.

improvements.name: Matrix Initiative
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Matrix Initiative by the value entered. Positive numbers increase Matrix Initiative. Negative numbers reduce Matrix Initiative.

improvements.name: Matrix Initiative Passes
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of Matrix Initiative Passes the character receives by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the number of Matrix Initiative Passes. Negative numbers reduce the number of Matrix Initiative Passes.

improvements.name: Lifestyle Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Nuyen cost of all Lifestyles by the percent value entered. All Lifestyles will now cost an additional X% per month. Positive number increase the Lifestyle's monthly Nuyen cost. Negative numbers reduce the Lifestyle's monthly Nuyen cost.

improvements.name: Genetech Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Nuyen cost of Bioware in the Genetech categories by the percent value entered. All Genetech Nuyen costs will now be X% of their original value. Numbers lower than 100 reduce the Nuyen cost. Numbers higher than 100 increase the Nuyen cost.

improvements.name: Transgenics Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Nuyen cost of Bioware in the Genetech: Transgenics category by the percent value entered. All Transgenics Nuyen costs will now be X% of their original value. Numbers lower than 100 reduce the Nuyen cost. Numbers higher than 100 increase the Nuyen cost.

improvements.name: Basic Bioware Essence Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Essence cost of Bioware in the Basic category by the percent value entered. All Basic Bioware Essence costs will now be X% of their original value. Numbers lower than 100 reduce the Essence cost. Numbers higher than 100 increase the Essence cost.

improvements.name: Bioware Essence Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Essence cost of Bioware by the percent value entered. All Bioware Essence costs will now be X% of their original value. Numbers lower than 100 reduce the Essence cost. Numbers higher than 100 increase the Essence cost.

improvements.name: Cyberware Essence Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Essence cost of Cyberware by the percent value entered. All Cyberware Essence costs will now be X% of their original value. Numbers lower than 100 reduce the Essence cost. Numbers higher than 100 increase the Essence cost.

improvements.name: Weapon Category DV
improvements.page: Adjusts the Damage Value of all Weapons in the selected category by the value entered. Positive numbers increase Weapon Damage Value. Negative numbers decrease Weapon Damage Value.

improvements.name: Movement Percent
improvements.page: Adjusts a character's Movement speed by the percent value entered. Positive numbers increase Movement speed. Negative numbers reduce Movement speed. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Movement speed.

improvements.name: Swim Percent
improvements.page: Adjusts a character's Swim speed by the percent value entered. Positive numbers increase Swim speed. Negative numbers reduce Swim speed. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Swim speed.

improvements.name: Fly Percent
improvements.page: Adjusts a character's Fly speed by the percent value entered. Positive numbers increase Fly speed. Negative numbers reduce Fly speed. This has no effect on characters that do not have a Fly speed.

improvements.name: Fly Speed
improvements.page: Grants a character a Fly speed of the value entered if they do not already have one. This has no effect on characters that already have a Fly speed.

improvements.name: Power Points, Free Spirit
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of Power Points a Free Spirit receives to spend on Critter Powers by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the number of Power Points. Negative numbers decrease the number of Power Points. This has no effect on non-Free Spirit characters.

improvements.name: Power Points, Adept
improvements.page: Adjusts the number of Power Points an Adept receives to spend on Adept Powers by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the number of Power Points. Negative numbers decrease the number of Power Points. This has no effect on non-Adept characters.

improvements.name: Armor Encumbrance Penalty
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Armor Encumbrance penalty by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Armor Encumbrance penalty (bad). Negative numbers decrease the Armor Encumbrance penalty (good).

improvements.name: Damage Resistance
improvements.page: Adjusts the size of the character's Damage Resistance Test dice pool by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the size of the pool. Negative numbers decrease the size of the pool.

improvements.name: Judge Intentions
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Judge Intentions Special Attribute by the value entered. Positive numbers improve Judge Intentions. Negative numbers reduce Judge Intentions.

improvements.name: Composure
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Composure Special Attribute by the value entered. Positive numbers improve Composure. Negative numbers reduce Composure.

improvements.name: Lift and Carry
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Lift and Carry Special Attribute by the value entered. Positive numbers improve Lift and Carry. Negative numbers reduce Lift and Carry.

improvements.name: Memory
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Memory Special Attribute by the value entered. Positive numbers improve Memory. Negative numbers reduce Memory.

improvements.name: Concealability
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's ability to conceal Weapons by the value entered. This bonus applies to the Concealability of all Weapons. Positive values improve Concealability. Negative values reduce Concealability.

improvements.name: Drain Resistance
improvements.page: Adjusts the size of the character's Drain Resistance pool by the value entered. Positive values increase the size of the pool. Negative values decrease the size of the pool.

improvements.name: Fading Resistance
improvements.page: Adjusts the size of the character's Fading Resistance pool by the value entered. Positive values increase the size of the pool. Negative values decrease the size of the pool.

improvements.name: Spells in Category
improvements.page: Adjusts the size of the character's Spellcasting pool when casting Spell in the selected category. Positive values improve Spellcasting. Negative values reduce Spellcasting.

improvements.name: Skillsoft Access
improvements.page: The character can use Knowsoft and Linguasoft Skillsofts as though they had a direct neural link.

improvements.name: Essence
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Essence by the value entered. Positive values increase Essence. Negative values decrease Essence.

improvements.name: Essence Maximum
improvements.page: Adjusts the character's Maximum Essence by the value entered. Positive values increase Maximum Essence. Negative values decrease Maximum Essence.

improvements.name: Throwing Weapon Range
improvements.page: Adjusts a character's STR for the purpose of determining the range of Throwing Weapons. Positive numbers increase the character's effective STR. Negative numbers reduce the character's effective STR.

improvements.name: Skillwire Rating
improvements.page: Grants the character access to Skillwires at the specified Rating which limits the effective Rating of all Skillsofts the character takes.

improvements.name: Swap Skill Attribute (Physical for Mental)
improvements.page: Swaps the Physical Attribute used by Active Skills with the corresponding Mental Attribute as described in the Astral Attributes table on SR4 192. (AGI/LOG; BOD/WIL; REA/INT; STR/CHA)

improvements.name: Quickening
improvements.page: Grants the character access to Quickening in the same manner as the Quickening Metamagic.

improvements.name: Basic Lifestyle Cost
improvements.page: Adjusts the Nuyen cost of all basic Lifestyles by the percent value entered. All basic Lifestyles will now cost an additional X% per month. Basic Lifestyles are only those found in the SR4 book and do not include Advanced Lifestyles, Safehouses, or Bolt Holes. Positive number increase the basic Lifestyle's monthly Nuyen cost. Negative numbers reduce the basic Lifestyle's monthly Nuyen cost.

improvements.name: Throwing Weapon STR
improvements.page: Adjusts a character's STR for the purpose of determining the DV of Throwing Weapons. Positive numbers increase the character's effective STR. Negative numbers reduce the character's effective STR.

improvements.name: Knowledge Skill
improvements.page: Adjusts the value for one of the character's Knowledge Skills by the value entered. Positive numbers increase the Knowledge Skill. Negative numbers decrease the Knowledge Skill. Select a Knowledge Skill to affect by clicking the Select Value button. The modifier can be applied to the Knowledge Skill's Rating by selecting Apply to Rating, otherwise the modifier is applied as a dice pool modifier.

improvements.name: Ignore Condition Monitor Penalty, Stun
improvements.page: Reduces the characters Stun Condition Monitor Penalty to 0 while the Improvement is active.

improvements.name: Ignore Condition Monitor Penalty, Physical
improvements.page: Reduces the characters Physical Condition Monitor Penalty to 0 while the Improvement is active.
